description: Product description Toothbrushes with Travel Cases 5 pc by Rysons are perfect for when travelling. Simply put the case onto the brush and take it with you. The toothbrushes and cases are compact, easy to pack and ideal for outdoor adventures amd essential items for every household. keeps shining your teeth and clean all round teeth. Safety Warning Choking hazard - Keep out of reach of children under 3 years old. Not a toy.
